description: BLACK SOCKS MEN'S 6-11: JCB are the number 1 work boot sock in the UK. These UK JCB socks for men 6-11 are perfect work socks and boot socks which will be part of your workwear staples. This pack of 3 black socks are thick socks which are comfortable and ideal for any working environment. These fantastic boot socks have hardwearing panels and reinforced heel and toe for durability, ensuring your feet are well looked after all day
